title: Max Difference You Can Get From Changing an Integer
hints: To maximize a - b, independently maximize a and minimize b. Consider greedy digit replacements for each.
For a, replace the first non-9 digit with 9. For b, replace the first digit with 1, or the first non-0, non-1 digit with 0.
Handle b carefully: if the first digit is 1, find the first digit > 1 to replace with 0. Otherwise, replace the first digit with 1.
